theme.archetype: The Performance Pro (Modified for Data Dashboard)
theme.description: A dense, high-contrast, data-rich layout inspired by Sofascore. Prioritizes scannability, functional utility, and real-time updates over decorative design.

dashboard.desktop: grid grid-cols-[240px_1fr_300px] gap-6 max-w-[1400px] mx-auto p-4
dashboard.center_feed: Livescore feed, vertically stacked matches grouped by league
dashboard.right_sidebar: WC2026 Countdown banner, Top Leaderboard, Featured Prize Pool

navigation.top_bar: Sticky header with Logo, Search, User Profile, Theme Toggle
navigation.sports_nav: Horizontal scrollable bar with 14 sports. Active state uses lime accent (#A3E635) bottom border.

match_row.structure: Vertical stack (Home team top, Away team bottom). Time/status on left, Teams in middle, Scores on right.
match_row.spacing: Dense padding (p-2 or p-3), minimal gaps.
match_row.hover: Subtle background highlight on hover (bg-white/5 in dark mode).
match_row.live_state: Red dot (#FF3D52) pulsing animation near time. Red text for current minute. Lime accent for winners.

cards.header: Border-b border-border_dark p-3 text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wider

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-slate-900 font-bold px-4 py-2 rounded-md hover:bg-primary_hover transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-accent_forest text-white font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-md hover:brightness-110 transition-colors

iconography.style: Regular or Bold weight, size 16px to 20px depending on context
iconography.usage: Use icons for sports in the nav, menu items, and UI actions. Keep them clean and legible.

animations.live_pulse: animate-pulse (1s duration, infinite) on the red live indicator dot.
animations.hover_transitions: transition-colors duration-200 ease-in-out for interactive elements.

world_cup_banner.description: Football stadium crowd, use for WC 2026 Countdown banner background or World Cup hub hero.

fantasy_player_action.description: Soccer player in action, use for Legend Cards (GOAT, Elite, Star) or Fantasy Hub placeholders.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast meets WCAG AA standards, especially on dark cards and lime primary buttons.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, match rows, tabs) MUST include descriptive data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='sports-nav-football', data-testid='match-row-chelsea-tottenham').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the 3-column Sofascore layout structure for the dashboard.
Match rows MUST be vertically stacked (home above away), right-aligned scores, and extremely dense.
Red (#FF3D52) is strictly reserved for the LIVE indicator dot (with pulse animation). Do not use it for errors or other UI elements.
Use CSS variables for theme switching (--cp-bg, --cp-text, etc.) mapping to the provided brand colors.
Implement the 14 sports horizontal scroll navigation.
Ensure the lime accent (#A3E635) is used effectively for active states, winners, and primary calls to action.
Build the dashboard to feel like a serious, data-rich sports utility, not a generic SaaS landing page.
